entry.title: Interested to learn BTP , and how to learn on my own?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently i am working as SAP Security &GRC consultant and i want to learn BTP .Please suggest me any link related to BTP.

entry.title: How to mass remove Profile from Users
entry.content:
Hello ,

i can find from SUIM T. Code all users in my Client , with SAP_ALL Profile.

How i can mass remove from some Users this Profile (SAP_ALL) ?

Thanks

entry.title: CITI Bank Encrypted API consume from SAP
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We want to consume BANK API , but BANK API is protected (Signing, Encrypted), I want to know how we can use SSF for consuming Encrypted API in SAP.

Like, Before sending request to bank API, it should singed and encrypted with Certificate and Bank portal will use certificate to decrypt and send data back to SAP in encrypted format, then SAP use BANK certificate to decrypt the data.

Br
Waqas

entry.title: How to configure a fiori standard app which does not have a tile?
entry.content:
Hello everyone:)

Can anyone please let me know how to configure this app-

This app is not visible to user in luanchpad as there is no tile for this standard app provided. So what steps I should do that user can access this app in luanchpad / can navigate to this app in their system.

Thanks in advance:)

entry.title: what is the HANA certification code for SAP SECURITY & GRC consultant .
entry.content: what is the HANA certification code for SAP SECURITY & GRC consultant .

entry.title: Getting extra letters are displayed in front of user id in manage sales order app
entry.content:
Hello folks,

After creation of sales order in manage sales order app (in both quality and dev system), user is getting extra letters in front of user id as shown in image. Can anyone let me know what reason cold be behind this issue.

microsoftteams-image-6.png

entry.title: SAP PO系统503报错，查看服务进程正常，端口正常
entry.content: SAP PO系统503报错，查看服务进程正常，端口正常

entry.title: marketing mail from sap via mktomail.com
entry.content:
We got a huge amount of suspicious mails from sap.com.
When we examined the header file we found as sender nktomail.com.

Is there a posibility to verify this mails?

entry.title: What the plan for SAP dotnet connector or ODBC driver support Tls 1.3?
entry.content: I need to enforce Tls 1.3 for my SAP server(S/4 hana and hana cloud) for security issue. How the connection via SAP SAP .NET Connector (sapnco.dll) or sap hana ODBC driver support TLS 1.3? Or do we have any plan to support this tls 1.3 property?

entry.title: Authorization objects VA01
entry.content:
Good day,

I would like to know what the authorization purpose is to restrict the creation of an Order in VA01, for a particular center.

The position information of the material (image attached).

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud : Hide models or Members
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to know if there is a way to hide or deactivate for users the possibility to see the file 'Planning Model' or if not to hide members in a dimension (public or private). Users must be able to read the models in the stories and add new members (for private & public dimension) but not been able to watch the dimension's members because of security concerns.

E.g I have a special dimension 'Demand' where users when clicking on a button can ask for new budget amount. They have to fill a form and give a comment (which is a property of the 'Demand' Dimension). When validated, a new demand ID is created as a member of the 'Demand' Dimension with the property 'Comment'. Others users must not be allowed to see this new member. The simpler would be that users are not allowed to see the members of 'Demand' Dimension.

Which security or permissions do I have to give?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Download BTP Role Collection and Mapping Role collection to Roles
entry.content:
We got a requirement from Audit to extract list of BTP role collections and corresponding role mapping with AD groups etc... We do not see the option to download. Can you please help us or provide documentation. Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DigiCert SSL certificate configuration for HTTP RFC connection
entry.content:
Hi,


If an application from ABAP ECC system RFC as the client side chooses a list of DigiCert certificates of multiple versions(including both older Root CA and newer G2 or G4 CA) as Standard SSL Client PSE,

i) how does RFC choose the certificate to pick?

ii) which version(older or latest version) of the same CA certificate is picked by RFC while establishing communication with the server-side hosted in SAP BTP Neo?

Could anyone please explain the concept and help me understand the priority mechanism of certificate cherrypicking by RFC when there are multiple versions of the same certificate?

This question is related to the recent deprecation of DigiCert Root CA which was replaced by DigiCert G2 by SAP for our internal product app-to-app flow testing.

Thanks,
BR,
Sayantan

entry.title: SAP BW risky/critical transactions
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

what are the SAP BW risky/critical transactions?

Thanks in advance,

Marie

entry.title: How to read Security audit Logs (SM19/SM20) using FM RSAU_READ_LOG?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I would like to read the security audit logs generated for the user during a specified time using the Function Module RASU_READ_LOG, but facing challenges in providing the required input.

Not understanding what input to be passed and which are required, tried a lot but the results returning are empty. I was able to fetch records using another FM RSAU_API_GET_LOG_DATA, but cannot use this as the FM is not remote/RFC enabled. 

Can someone kindly let me know or share some documentation related to this FM RASU_READ_LOG about expected inputs.

entry.title: Using BTP IPS, is it possible to read data from tables or else other function modules for ABAP ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to understand Using IPS, is it possible to read data from standard tables or else other function modules? I remember using SAP IDM ABAP connector it is possible to read data from tables as well as execute function modules apart from the standard BAPI_USER_CHANGE or RFC_READ_TABLE etc.,

My requirement is to execute RFC enabled BAPI calls like RFC_READ_TABLE/RSAU_READ_LOG and expose the data as the Proxy api. Currently i am able to connect SAP ABAP NW 7.5 system to IPS as a proxy and able to read the roles, users and perform provisioning activities related to user using the Proxy api's .

entry.title: SU01 shows role assigned via position but the role does not appear in PO13
entry.content: In SU01, the user appears to have certain roles assigned at the position level.  However, in PO13 the position does not contain a relationship for this role.

entry.title: Appgyver Platform
entry.content: I have a problem to access the platform appgyver, since a week the site is showing a message about a security certificate expired, anyone can help me ?

entry.title: SAP GSOAP VERSION DISCLOSURE VULNERABILITY
entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing security issue, SAP gsoap exposes its version information during network scanning,

Any ways to hide the version related information from SAP application ?

entry.title: auth. object to restrict access to global data/ client level
entry.content:
An authorization object needs to be applied to several roles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
